circleMembers.title: Members
circleMembers.subtitle: Family and caregivers in this circle
circleMembers.changeRoleHint: Choose the new role for this member.
circleMembers.ownerNote: The owner can't be removed or demoted. Transfer ownership to another member first.
circleMembers.lastAdminNote: The last administrator can't be removed or demoted. Add another admin first.

direction.increase: This gives the member more access than they have now.
direction.lateral: This changes the member's role without raising or lowering their access.

errors.lastAdmin: This would leave the circle without an administrator.
errors.owner: Transfer ownership to another member before this can be done.
errors.notAllowed: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.generic: Could not complete the change. Please try again.

can: Manage all care records (medications, tasks, appointments, logs)
Grant administrative roles, according to server rules
cannot: Override the owner — ownership is a separate state shown as a badge
Remove or demote the owner without an ownership transfer

can: Manage supported members and invitations within the permitted hierarchy
cannot: Grant or change admin privileges unless server rules allow it

family_member.summary: A family member with broad visibility.
can: Record permitted care activity and dose/task actions
cannot: Manage membership, ownership or core circle settings

remote_member.summary: Follows along and keeps in touch from a distance.
can: View and follow up on the circle's care
Receive the follow-up alerts they enable (such as missed doses)
cannot: Record sensitive care actions unless the current rules allow it
Be assigned until its dedicated least-privilege role is implemented
Be assigned until its dedicated least-privilege role is implemented

invitations.createdSubtitle: Share this code with the person you're inviting. It works once.
invitations.codeOnceWarning: This code is shown only now and can't be retrieved later. If it's lost, revoke it and create a new one.

circleTimezone.title: Care circle timezone
circleTimezone.explain: Medication and task times follow the cared-for person's location, so reminders fire at the right local time for everyone.
circleTimezone.confirmPrompt: Please confirm the correct timezone for this circle.
circleTimezone.managerOnly: Only an admin or primary caregiver can change the timezone.
circleTimezone.invalid: That timezone isn't recognized. Use an IANA name like Asia/Riyadh.
circleTimezone.error: Could not update the timezone. Please try again.
circleTimezone.impact: Reminders for medications and tasks will fire at the local time in {{tz}}.

notifications.emptySubtitle: Reminders and updates will appear here.

notificationSettings.subtitle: Choose what you're notified about

scope.title: These settings apply to
scope.globalHint: Your default for every circle, unless a circle has its own settings.
scope.circleHint: Settings just for {{circle}}. They override your defaults for this circle.

medicationReminders.label: Medication reminders
medicationReminders.description: When a scheduled dose is due.

missedDoseAlerts.description: When a scheduled dose hasn't been recorded.

careUpdates.label: Care updates
careUpdates.description: Daily logs and other care notes.

remoteSummary.label: Follow-up summaries
remoteSummary.description: Summaries for remote members following along.

quietHours.label: Quiet hours
quietHours.description: Pause non-urgent notifications during these hours.
quietHours.note: Quiet hours can cross midnight. Normal reminders are delivered after quiet hours end; emergency alerts may still arrive.
quietHours.invalid: Set both a start and end time for quiet hours.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.hint: Your device timezone, used for your quiet hours and display. Scheduled medication and task times follow the care circle's timezone.

test.description: Schedule a local test notification a few seconds from now. It shows only on this device and doesn't notify anyone else.
test.title: Sanad test
test.body: This is a local test notification.
test.failed: Could not schedule the test notification.

push.explainBody: Sanad can remind you about medication doses, care tasks and upcoming appointments so nothing is missed.
push.privacy: Notifications are tied to your account on this device only. We never share your device token or include sensitive health details in them.
push.granted: Notifications are on for this device.
push.web: On the web the in-app notification center works, but device push notifications aren't available — open Sanad on your phone to enable them.
push.noDevice: Push notifications need a physical device. Try this on your phone.

results.denied: Notifications are turned off. You can enable them for Sanad in your device settings.
results.no-device: Push notifications need a physical device.
results.project-id-missing: Notifications aren't fully configured in this build yet. Please try again after the next update.
results.error: Could not enable notifications. Please try again.
